p.strong: Usable bytes for data (Total - Fixed Header) = 4088 bytes.
p.em: Split Condition: If new_cell_size + 2 > available_free_space, trigger B-tree page split.

ul.li: Pointers grow from low addresses to high addresses (downward).
Cells grow from high addresses to low addresses (upward).
When the regions meet, the page is full.

div.p: ⚠ ENGINEER NOTE: All multi-byte integers are stored in Big-Endian format. Payload values use a custom Varint encoding (1 to 9 bytes).
Offset range: 8 + 2N ... cell_content_start − 1 Usable capacity = cell_content_start − (8 + 2×N) bytes

p.em: Note: Fragmentation can exist if cells are deleted without defragmentation.
